sprint_goal: Family can create accounts, log in with PIN or password, admin can manage members

agent_instructions.role: You are a senior full-stack engineer building OpenFamHub from scratch. You write complete, production-quality code. Never produce stubs or TODO placeholders — every file you create must be fully functional. Work through tasks in the exact order listed. A task marked is_blocker:true must have all acceptance_check commands passing before you proceed to the next task. After each task run the commands in acceptance_check before marking it done.

python_environment.policy: ALL Python work must use the project virtual environment at backend/.venv. Never use the system Python or pip directly for project dependencies.
python_environment.verify_active: which python | grep .venv || echo 'ERROR: venv not active'
python_environment.rule: Before running ANY python, alembic, or pytest command, confirm the venv is active. If the shell prompt does not show (.venv), run the activate command first.
python_environment.docker_note: Docker containers have their own isolated Python environment via the Dockerfile — the .venv is for local development and CI only, not inside containers.

node_environment.policy: All Node/npm work runs from the frontend/ directory. node_modules are local to frontend/ — never install globally.
node_environment.rule: Always cd into frontend/ before running npm commands.

code_style.python: PEP8, type hints on all functions, async/await throughout, docstrings on public functions
code_style.typescript: strict mode, explicit return types, no any, functional components with hooks
code_style.general: no commented-out code, no TODO comments, no stubs, complete files every time

agent_instructions.file_rule: Always write the complete file. Never truncate. If a file already exists, read it first then write the full updated version.
agent_instructions.error_rule: All API endpoints must have try/except. All async DB operations wrapped. No unhandled exceptions reach the client.
agent_instructions.version_rule: The application version is stored in ONE canonical location: backend/app/core/config.py as APP_VERSION = '0.1.0'. The Dockerfile, README badge, and API health endpoint all read from this. Never hardcode the version string in more than one place.
agent_instructions.theme_default: dark — the <html> element ships with class='dark' by default. Users can toggle per-profile. Stored in users.settings_json.theme (light|dark).
agent_instructions.user_switch: Shared devices (wall, kitchen tablet) need a quick user-switch. NavShell must include a 'Switch User' button that shows the family member avatar grid and requires PIN to switch — without a full logout/login cycle.
agent_instructions.notifications: Backend must send both email (SMTP) and Discord webhook notifications for: sync job failures, backup job errors, and release announcements. Both channels are wired up via backend/app/services/notifications.py

stack.backend: Python 3.12 + FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + aiosqlite + Alembic + APScheduler + PyJWT + passlib[bcrypt]
stack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + TanStack Query v5 + Zustand + React Router v6 + axios + vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox + react-big-calendar + date-fns
stack.infra: Docker Compose v2 + Caddy 2 alpine + nginx:alpine (frontend prod) + Avahi mDNS
stack.ci: GitHub Actions AMD64 only (no QEMU, no ARM64)

key_decisions.calendar_sync: ICS feed URLs only. No OAuth. Sync upserts on external_uid. External always wins on conflict.
key_decisions.recurring_events: Fully expand recurring events to individual rows on import. 12-month rolling window.
key_decisions.colour_model: Colour on calendar_sources.color_hex. Filter chips per source not per person.
key_decisions.host: AMD64 Linux server. Pi is display-only device pointing at server.
key_decisions.repo: GitHub public. GHCR images. GitHub Actions CI.
key_decisions.dev_machine: Mac Intel + Docker Desktop. openfamhub.local via Bonjour.

context.db_pattern: UUID TEXT primary keys. All timestamps UTC. Soft deletes via is_deleted. WAL mode + foreign_keys=ON pragmas on connect.
context.auth_pattern: JWT in httpOnly SameSite=Strict cookie. get_current_user FastAPI dependency. PIN rate limit: 5 attempts per 60s window.
context.sync_pattern: APScheduler AsyncIOScheduler. Each calendar_source has sync_interval_hours. Sync job checks source.last_synced_at + interval on each scheduler tick. Upsert on (source_id, external_uid). Delete rows where external_uid no longer in feed.

repo_structure.backend/app/main.py: FastAPI app, lifespan hooks, CORS, routers, StaticFiles mount
repo_structure.backend/app/core/database.py: async engine, WAL+FK pragmas, get_db dependency
repo_structure.backend/app/core/security.py: JWT, bcrypt, get_current_user, require_role, PIN rate limiter
repo_structure.frontend/src/wall/: Wall display components (isolated, no auth guard)

env_vars.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL: Discord webhook URL for notifications. Create at: discord.com/developers/applications → your server → Integrations → Webhooks
env_vars.SMTP_PASSWORD: SMTP password or app-specific password. For Gmail generate at: myaccount.google.com → Security → App passwords
env_vars.SMTP_FROM: From address for notification emails e.g. homehub@gmail.com
env_vars.SMTP_TO: Recipient address for admin alerts e.g. your@email.com
env_vars.DATA_PATH: ./data  # Change to NAS mount point e.g. /mnt/nas/homehub
env_vars.APP_VERSION: 0.01  # Do not edit manually — updated by release checklist

execution_rules.rule_1: Complete tasks in the exact order listed. Do not start a task until all tasks in depends_on are verified passing.
execution_rules.rule_2: Tasks marked is_blocker:true must have all acceptance_check commands passing before you proceed.
execution_rules.rule_3: Write every file completely. No stubs, no truncation, no TODOs.
execution_rules.rule_4: After completing ALL tasks in this sprint, run the sprint_exit_verification commands below.

tasks.title: DB migration 001: families, users, sessions

files_to_create.spec: SQLAlchemy ORM models. Family: id TEXT PK uuid default, name TEXT not null, timezone TEXT default UTC, settings_json JSON default dict, created_at DateTime UTC. User: id TEXT PK uuid default, family_id TEXT FK families.id not null, display_name TEXT not null, role TEXT not null (admin|co_admin|teen|child|guest), avatar_type TEXT default emoji, avatar_value TEXT default person emoji, color_hex TEXT default #4F46E5, ui_mode TEXT default standard, pin_hash TEXT nullable, password_hash TEXT nullable, settings_json JSON default dict, is_deleted BOOL default false, created_at DateTime UTC, last_login_at DateTime nullable. Session: id TEXT PK uuid default, user_id TEXT FK users.id not null, token_hash TEXT not null unique, device_hint TEXT nullable, expires_at DateTime not null, created_at DateTime UTC. Add module-level helper functions utcnow() and new_uuid(). Add relationships: Family.users -> User, User.family -> Family.

shell_commands: cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && alembic upgrade head
acceptance_check: source backend/.venv/bin/activate && python -c "import sys; print('venv:', sys.prefix)" | grep .venv && echo VENV_OK
cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && alembic downgrade -1 && alembic upgrade head && echo ROUNDTRIP_PASS

tasks.title: Auth API: setup, login (password + PIN), logout, me, setup/status

files_to_create.spec: Pydantic models. SetupRequest: family_name str min_length 1 max_length 200, timezone str, admin_display_name str min_length 1 max_length 100, admin_password str min_length 8. LoginRequest: display_name str, password str. PinLoginRequest: user_id str, pin str min_length 4 max_length 8. UserResponse: id, display_name, role, color_hex, ui_mode, avatar_type, avatar_value, family_id — all str. Config from_attributes=True. SetupStatusResponse: setup_complete bool.

APIRouter prefix /api/auth. GET /setup/status: count families, return SetupStatusResponse. POST /setup: if family exists raise 400. Create Family row, create User with role=admin hash_password(admin_password), create access token, set httpOnly SameSite=Strict secure=True max_age=2592000 cookie, return UserResponse. POST /login: find user by lower(display_name) case-insensitive, verify_password, set cookie, update last_login_at, return UserResponse. POST /login/pin: check_pin_rate_limit(user_id), load user, verify PIN with passlib, set cookie, update last_login_at, return UserResponse. POST /logout: delete cookie by setting max_age=0. GET /me: uses get_current_user dependency, returns UserResponse.

files_to_modify.change: Import auth router and include it: app.include_router(auth_router)

acceptance_check: source backend/.venv/bin/activate && python -c "import sys; print('venv:', sys.prefix)" | grep .venv && echo VENV_OK

curl -sk -X POST https://openfamhub.local/api/auth/setup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"family_name":"Test","timezone":"UTC","admin_display_name":"Admin","admin_password":"password123"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('display_name')=='Admin'" && echo SETUP_PASS
curl -sk https://openfamhub.local/api/auth/setup/status | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['setup_complete']==True" && echo STATUS_PASS

tasks.title: Users API: public list, CRUD, avatar upload

files_to_create.spec: async generate_thumbnail(source_path, dest_path, size tuple). Uses asyncio.to_thread with Pillow Image.open().thumbnail().save(JPEG quality=85). Register pillow_heif opener at module level if pillow-heif is installed.

PublicUserResponse: id, display_name, avatar_type, avatar_value, color_hex. CreateUserRequest: display_name str, role str, color_hex str default #4F46E5, ui_mode str default standard, avatar_type str default emoji, avatar_value str default person emoji, pin str|None, password str|None. PatchUserRequest: all fields Optional.

APIRouter prefix /api/users. GET /public: no auth, return list of PublicUserResponse (id, display_name, avatar_type, avatar_value, color_hex) for non-deleted users in the family. Never return pin_hash or password_hash. GET /: requires auth, returns all non-deleted users as UserResponse. POST /: require_role admin co_admin, create user with optional pin_hash and password_hash. PATCH /{id}: own profile OR admin. DELETE /{id}: admin only, set is_deleted=True, cannot delete self (raise 400 if deleting own id). POST /{id}/avatar: multipart UploadFile, save to /data/photos/avatars/{user_id}.jpg, call generate_thumbnail to /data/photos/avatars/{user_id}_thumb.jpg at 96x96, return {url: /photos/avatars/{user_id}_thumb.jpg}.

acceptance_check: source backend/.venv/bin/activate && python -c "import sys; print('venv:', sys.prefix)" | grep .venv && echo VENV_OK
curl -sk https://openfamhub.local/api/users/public | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert isinstance(d,list) and 'pin_hash' not in str(d)" && echo PUBLIC_PASS

tasks.title: Setup wizard + login page + manage users (frontend)

files_to_create.spec: TanStack Query hooks and mutation functions. useSetupStatus(): useQuery GET /api/auth/setup/status. useSetup(): useMutation POST /api/auth/setup. useLogin(): useMutation POST /api/auth/login. usePinLogin(): useMutation POST /api/auth/login/pin. useLogout(): useMutation POST /api/auth/logout. useMe(): useQuery GET /api/auth/me. usePublicUsers(): useQuery GET /api/users/public.

Three-step wizard. Local state for step 1|2|3 and formData. Step 1: family name text input (required min 1), timezone combobox using Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone') with search filter. Step 2: admin display name, password (min 8), confirm password (must match). Step 3: summary card showing entered values, submit button. On submit call useSetup mutation. On success call setUser(response) then navigate /dashboard. Disable submit while isPending. Show API error message on failure. Use shadcn Card Input Button Select.

Load public users via usePublicUsers. Show grid of avatar cards (min 120x120px). Each card: avatar (emoji large or img), display_name below. On card tap: set selectedUser, show PIN pad if user has pin_hash indicator (role child or teen), else show password input. PIN pad: custom 3x3 grid + 0 + backspace — NOT <input type=number>. State is a string built digit by digit. Auto-submit when string reaches 4-8 chars. Password field: text input + submit button. Call usePinLogin or useLogin. On success setUser + navigate /dashboard. Show attempt counter and lockout message on 429 response. Back button returns to user grid.

Redirect to /dashboard if current user role is not admin or co_admin. List family members with role badge, colour swatch, avatar. Add member button opens shadcn Sheet side=right with form: display_name, role Select (all 5 roles with descriptions), color_hex (8 preset swatch circles), ui_mode toggle, PIN input, optional password input. Edit: same sheet pre-filled. Delete: confirmation Dialog. All mutations call appropriate users API endpoints and invalidate users queries.
Listens to window online/offline events and navigator.onLine. When offline renders a fixed top banner: yellow bg, text You are offline showing saved data, z-50. Returns null when online.

beforeinstallprompt handler stores the event. Shows a fixed bottom bar with Install button when event is available. iOS Safari detection (navigator.userAgent includes iPad|iPhone|iPod and not standalone): shows a bottom sheet with instruction to tap Share then Add to Home Screen. Stores ios-install-shown in localStorage so the guide only shows once. Both prompts are dismissible.

acceptance_check: Navigate to /login -> shows family member cards
Enter wrong PIN 5 times -> lockout message appears

sprint_exit_verification: All blocker tasks verified with acceptance_check commands
Sprint goal achieved: Family can create accounts, log in with PIN or password, admin can manage members
